reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 22 refreeze binds the corrected 25-case SEC corpus and the final ornith:9b pipeline after adding fail-closed fragment guards, decision-relevant fallback projections, post-echo fact backfill, question-bound review actions, and the existing concise Brief repair. A fresh three-source HealthNet pilot on the final pipeline measured 33.68 seconds for Brief and 14.083 seconds for an evidence-backed answerable Ask. The 45-second regression budget remains unchanged; the canonical 50-operation run must still demonstrate the final p95 and the ten-minute first-value contract remains unchanged.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
